title: Founding Generalist
key_evidence: Role: 'work directly with the Founder and Operations & Finance Lead, own highest-leverage priorities each week spanning HR, commercial, operations, finance, legal, revops and investor relations' - textbook FA/generalist matching Ryan's Minima FA experience (ops, fundraising support, cross-functional execution)
Explicitly: 'Deploying and managing AI agents and tools that unlock new levels of operational efficiency' - direct hook for Ryan's Claude Code agent-building spike
Investor relations + 'building foundations to scale the team' - maps to Ryan's $2.5m seed support + 1->30 scaling experience
Cambridge HQ - Ryan is currently based in Cambridge (relocating to London), so this is geographically convenient (no relocation friction); min 3 days/week in-office is workable
Deep-tech University-of-Cambridge spinout, decarbonisation B2B SaaS - domain is climate/supply-chain emissions, NOT crypto; meaningful domain ramp but mission-driven
Spike fit is moderate: role leans ops/finance/HR/legal/revops generalist (back-office) rather than Ryan's community-led growth/marketing spike - less GTM/community than Specter or Magentic
Small founding team (spinout) on Workable = founder/ops-lead read applications directly = high human-screen, low ATS risk
Climatebase listing 403'd; salary not confirmed from sources - comp uncertain (risk vs 50k floor)
Warm path: small team, Workable application + likely discoverable founder; Cambridge network
biggest_lever: Geography + FA-archetype: Ryan is Cambridge-based and has done this exact FA job (ops + fundraising support + cross-functional ownership at a 1->30 startup); pair that with the 'deploy/manage AI agents' line - lead with the Claude Code operational-efficiency angle, which most generalist applicants can't claim.
biggest_risk: Role weights back-office ops/finance/HR/legal/revops over Ryan's community-led growth spike, and the domain (carbon/decarbonisation deep-tech) is unfamiliar; salary unconfirmed and could sit below the 50k floor for a founding-generalist seat.
